response_constraints: Do not claim any result not established by a tool response.
Keep each call's result separate; do not transfer identifiers or fields between calls.
Report the retrieved record, availability result, and filtered list as distinct findings.
Label requested information as unknown when the tools do not return it.
state_assertions: Persistent simulator state is unchanged by the read-only calls.

stages.purpose: Call projects_get, projects_availability, and projects_list together; every argument is user-supplied, so no call consumes another call's result.

prompt: For the project status brief, run three independent read-only checks in one assistant action: retrieve pro-210; check whether "Policy Review" is available on 2026-09-11 in Beacon; and list active tasks in Beacon. Do not create, update, cancel, or notify any record. Use only returned fields; label any requested field the tools omit as unknown.
